div.div:
For each receivable make deduction for each liability according POD until receivable current amount reaches 0 or until all liabilities are covered.
Note:
should deduct only liabilities and receivables which include same PODs

div.div:
full offset date = max date from all offseteting sub objects
deducted date
deducted date = max of occurrence date between liability and receivable
